results.title: I found the prettiest £30 'out for lunch' dress that's easy to throw on with trainers or sandals
results.description: "Wanted a day wear dress to go out to lunch. This is lovely. Colour pattern is lovely. Drapes well."

results.title: Wineaux: Drinking in the centuries with rosé
results.description: I walked into Vintage Berkeley last week and said to manager Mike: “I need a wine. White or rosé (to accompany a “things” dinner), under $25, under 12.5% alcohol and, most important, delicious and interesting.”

results.title: Joburg faces infrastructure collapse as illegal miners strip underground foundations
results.description: With at least 100 years’ worth of gold still buried beneath Johannesburg, the City’s illegal mining crisis isn’t going away any time soon, and it threatens far more than just collapsing roads, sinkholes, and bridges.

results.title: Tacloban school maintains classes amid ‘threat’
results.description: Leyte National High School keeps face-to-face classes open after an online mass shooting threat was addressed, with police and school officials implementing tighter security measures in Tacloban.

results.title: Legal battle looms in Ghana as 20-year mining conviction for Wontumi sparks constitutional debate
results.description: The 20-year prison sentence handed to Bernard Antwi-Boasiako, Ashanti Regional Chairman of Ghana’s opposition New Patriotic Party (NPP), for illegal mining has ignited a profound constitutional debate. While the Accra High Court’s Monday ruling marks a significant milestone in the nation’s battle against ‘galamsey’—illegal small-scale mining—the opposition has condemned the verdict as a calculated miscarriage [...]

results.title: Meet Jimothy, the Seattle Raccoon Who Is Taking Over the Internet
results.description: The stout raccoon, which has a spinal condition, is “an example to all of us that you don’t have to be perfect to be loved,” a Seattle City Council member said.

results.title: United Council on Welfare Fraud's Training Conference
results.description: United Council on Welfare Fraud's 53rd National Training Conference will be 3 full days Sep 1-3, 2026 in Pittsburgh, PA We're looking for interested individuals that would be interested in presenting insightful and thought-provoking presentations on FRAUD at the upcoming conference! If you or you know someone who would be interested, please have them click here to fill out the Presenter Application. 18 hrs of training workshops focused exclusively on public assistance FRAUD issues ranging from front-line fraud investigations to effective program administration and fraud recovery and collection techniques Opportunities to network with peers; Workshop sessions offered by subject matter...

results.title: Police detain Rahul Gandhi at protest outside PM Modi’s home
results.description: Indian police have detained Congress leader Rahul Gandhi as he protested outside the residence of the Prime Minister.

results.title: Moti Lal Vora’s wife’s ashes immersed at Sangam
results.description: Moti Lal Vora’s wife Shanti Devi Vora’s ashes were immersed at Prayagraj Sangam on Tuesday with Vedic chants and Hindu rituals; she died July 13.

results.title: Pomerantz Law Firm Announces the Filing of a Class Action Against AeroVironment, Inc. and ...

results.title: Mike Johnson urges lawmakers to pass the SAVE America Act before monthlong recess
results.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson pushed for lawmakers to pass the controversial SAVE America Act before the monthlong congressional recess begins July 27. CBS News' Nikole Killion has more.

results.title: BJP Slams Congress Leader Rahul Gandhi After Detention During Protest Near PM Modi's Residence Over NEET Issue
results.description: BJP President Nitin Nabin criticised Congress leaders after Rahul Gandhi, Priyanka Gandhi Vadra and others were detained during a protest near PM Narendra Modi’s residence in New Delhi. The opposition was demanding a discussion on the NEET-UG issue and resignation of Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan, while Parliament witnessed disruptions over the matter.

results.title: Secret Service officer, hotel staff to be honored at rescheduled White House media dinner
results.description: The Secret Service officer and staff members at the Hilton hotel will be presented with a special award for their "exceptional service."
